overrideJustification: After 2 rounds of user-testing, 5 assertions pass (RBAC access denial, guardrail messaging, JSON/HTML export, shared report). 30 are blocked: admin/reviewer roles require JWT claims configured at auth provider level (not self-service), clipboard API denied in agent-browser, and live study pipeline needs Cloudflare Browser Rendering. All hardening logic tested by 378 unit tests covering RBAC guards, guardrail enforcement, credential encryption, cost controls, observability, settings management, and export.
